caption:
Before and after. Same business. Same owner. 4 days apart.

DS Nails had a Facebook page and zero Google presence. Now they have a full booking site with a service menu, gallery, pricing, and an auth system for regular clients.

The difference a real website makes isn't aesthetic — it's operational. Clients book online. Staff manage the schedule. The business runs smoother.

This is what we build. 💅

→ bienzoli.com — Grand Baie package

#DSNails #BeforeAndAfter #SalonWebsite #MauritiusBeauty #bienzoli

templateData.headline: Same salon. 4 days. Completely different online presence.
templateData.verdictText: Full booking site, gallery, auth — delivered in 4 days.
